title: The house base load aggregates at the energy manager
description: With the house's time-of-day peaks zeroed to a flat base load and no EV charging, the house draws its base consumption and the energy manager aggregates it across its request-response poll cycle. PV/weather drive only the supply side, so these consumption assertions stay deterministic offline and online. Deterministic under `dale dev --stepped`.

steps.label: Run several manager + house poll cycles (25 s of virtual time)
The house draws its flat base load
The manager aggregates the house consumption

judge.text: On the live default topology PV supply tracks the current weather; this scenario asserts only the weather-independent consumption side, so it reproduces offline and online
